tagline: Ten full years. Four new teams. One crown.

teams.name: Trick or Treat Freaks
teams.identity: Defending champs. Mask-Nought combo anchored by draw engine.
teams.oneliner: Back to defend their title and make it three finals appearances in a row.

teams.name: No Lands For You
teams.identity: Land destruction and hand disruption. Unfinished business after losing the S8 finals.
teams.oneliner: Shift out of 3x Black Vise and into legendary foils like Nether Void.

teams.name: Darwin's Doom
teams.identity: Big baddies + draw engine. Going whole-hog into Force of Nature territory.
teams.oneliner: Wild and swingy, promises to be chaotic.

teams.name: Swamp Things
teams.identity: Graveyard resurrection. Ditch blue, load up on hasty haymakers.
teams.oneliner: Downright terrifying with new red additions.

teams.name: Hand Grenade
teams.identity: Underworld Dreams + Yawgmoth Demon + lock artifacts. Maximum per-turn pain.
teams.oneliner: Ol' Yawggy joins a band of misfit artifacts to complement U-Dreams.

teams.name: Dark N Stormy
teams.identity: Mono-red direct damage. Set your hair on fire energy.
teams.oneliner: Same old squad, same old energy. A perfect wrinkle in the league.

teams.name: Mean Machine
teams.identity: All-goblin chaos. Unrecognizable after a trip to the build-a-goblin factory.
teams.oneliner: Wild, reckless, overpowering — now with custom cards from C&T.

teams.name: Sliver Lining
teams.identity: Season 7 champs. Truly horrifying new free agents added.
teams.oneliner: Added some truly horrifying free agents and now wants to play them…again.

teams.name: Folk Music
teams.identity: Merfolk tribal. Mike's annoying AF merman outfit is back again.
teams.oneliner: Rhythmic, deafening and mesmerizing. The Music plays on.

teams.name: Clockwork
teams.identity: All-artifact. The Facts Machine rebrand, still working out the kinks.
teams.oneliner: Nuts and bolts parade. Urzatron-powered mechanical mayhem.

teams.name: Bone Dry
teams.identity: All-out siege on your hand. Bad Ass Fault's best black cards distilled.
teams.oneliner: New team. Pure hand destruction. Your cards are not safe.

teams.name: Demolition Derby
teams.identity: Attritionists-Extinction mashup. Sac engine meets Lhurgoyf.
teams.oneliner: An Atts-X mashup that could kinda sorta maybe work.

teams.name: Holy War
teams.identity: Knights, Thunder Spirits, and more knights. Mono-white aggro.
teams.oneliner: Knights, knights, thunder spirits and more knights.

teams.name: The Emerald Army
teams.identity: Old-school mono-green elves and wolves. Land disruption via Ice Storm and Thermokarst.
teams.oneliner: The original elf army, now with wolves, wasps, and a grudge.

teams.name: Team 15
teams.identity: Roster and identity to be finalized before Season 9 kickoff.

teams.name: Team 16
teams.identity: Roster and identity to be finalized before Season 9 kickoff.
